This bracer
QuoteReply
# Jan 18 2022 at 1:05 PM Rating: Excellent
fcoty28
Guru
207 posts
Is also used in the Shadowknight Bracer, Dreadscale
▲ Page top
Banded
QuoteReply
# Sep 20 2004 at 3:07 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1672013818933
Scholar
111 posts
Banded is a nice newbie set of armor. There are thirteen (13) pieces in the set (Belt, Boots, Bracer [2], Cloak, Gauntlets, Gorget, Helm, Leggings, Mail, Mantle, Mask, Sleeves). The whole set of armor will give you +91 to your armor class (thats with 2 bracers). When I first started EQ banded was really popular and would sell for 2pp per ac point. This was pre-bazaar. Now you can get various piece in the bazaar for fairly cheap from those trying to up their blacksmithing skills.
▲ Page top
Quest items???
QuoteReply
# Apr 09 2003 at 4:13 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1652660341379
758 posts
Anyone know how or if any of the Banded armor is used in Quests...? I was told that was the main reason people need it, yet I see no posts on the messages I have read on any of the Banded Armor...

Thanks in advance!
▲ Page top
RE: Quest items???
QuoteReply
# Apr 09 2003 at 4:18 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592245745802
View User Forum
Sage
950 posts
Banded armor is required for the Totemic armor quests. It may also be used in other armor quests, but the Totemic quests are the ones I have actually done.
▲ Page top
RE: Quest items???
QuoteReply
# Apr 09 2003 at 4:52 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1652660341379
758 posts
So is this a decent quest to attempt? What classes and such can/should do it...? Will try and find it on Allakhazam somewhere and leave a link if I do...
▲ Page top
RE: Quest items???
QuoteReply
# Apr 10 2003 at 1:42 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592245745802
View User Forum
Sage
950 posts
Totemic armor is only for Shamen, all races but Iksar, not sure about Froglok. If you are a Shaman, then these are good lvl 30ish quests.
▲ Page top
RE: Quest items???
QuoteReply
# May 15 2003 at 5:38 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1652660341379
758 posts
If anyone needs and Banded Armors made, hail Lidium Regalianator (a short and stout Dwarf Warrior) on the Ayonae Ro server!

I can and will make FREE if you bring the pieces to me, and will also make cheap if I have to gather them (you can look above right for the ingredients to gather).

I am currently at 106 Smith Skill, so if there is anything else you need made let me know!

Lidium: http://www.magelo.com/eq_view_profile.html?num=688542

Edited, Fri May 30 08:01:58 2003
▲ Page top
Banded armor is not my type
QuoteReply
# Feb 22 2003 at 2:57 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593966342901
6 posts
Banded armor is only good for newbies...Though im only level 6 i would not waste my money on any banded arnor except the boots..They are pretty nice boots...But im doing the cleric armor quests...if you are a newbie dont waste money on the banded boots just do the armor quests...The armors have special abilities once you forge them
